fields.notes: Opened WhatsApp Web for sending

fields.hero_title_highlight: Good and Quality Water for All
fields.hero_description: Nkula Water Users Association (WUA) is a community-based organization established by the Government of Malawi, with financial support from the African Development Bank (ADB), to provide safe, sustainable, and reliable water access to local communities.
fields.about_content:
Nkula Water Users Association (WUA) is a community-based organization established in 2013 by the Government of Malawi, with financial support from the African Development Bank (ADB). We exist to empower communities to take ownership of their water resources and drive local development initiatives.

We partner with local leaders and community members to ensure that all water schemes are effectively managed, safeguarded, and maintained for the benefit of everyone.
fields.mission_text: To empower communities, promote public health, and build climate resilience through sustainable and responsible water management.
fields.values_text:
Transparency & Accountability
Integrity & Honesty
Teamwork & Collaboration
Community Ownership
fields.location_address: Matandika Village, T/A Nkula, Machinga District, Malawi
fields.location_description: We serve multiple villages through our managed schemes and catchment areas.
fields.projects_intro: Nkula WUA is committed to improving water availability and sustainability by supporting:
fields.projects_items:
Water scheme rehabilitation
Community capacity building
Water point monitoring
Hygiene and sanitation awareness
Catchment protection programs
fields.projects_outro: We believe safe water is the foundation of a healthy and productive community.
fields.cta_title: Join Us in Building Sustainable Water Access
fields.cta_description: Nkula WUA invites partners, community members, and stakeholders to support the mission of providing safe and sustainable water. Together we can protect our water sources and improve lives.
fields.footer_text:
Nkula Water Users Association (WUA)
Quality water for All!!
2026 Nkula Water Users Association. All Rights Reserved.
Designed for Community Water Development and Sustainability.
fields.water_sources_subtitle: Water infrastructure and natural sources sustaining our communities

fields.news_content:
Meeting announcements
Scheme maintenance updates
Community sanitation campaigns
Training and awareness programs
fields.news_intro: Stay updated with the latest activities and announcements from Nkula WUA.
fields.meeting_objectives_intro: Our regular meetings are aimed at:
fields.meeting_objectives_items:
Discussing ways to improve the performance of water schemes
Reviewing completed activities
Identifying challenges faced in the schemes
Planning solutions and community action strategies

Nkala Scheme|Managed water infrastructure for local villages
Dodza Scheme|Sustainable water solutions for the community
Milala Scheme|Clean water access for thousands of residents
